readings.Aries: Something in your body is signalling before your mind has caught up. Trust the signal. Trust the slow version of this over the fast one.
readings.Taurus: The waiting you've been doing is almost over. You will need to be ready to move. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Gemini: Your natural frequency is connection. Right now you need a little deliberate silence. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Cancer: The relationship that costs you the most emotionally might be where you're needed most. Or not. Check. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Leo: Your radiance is not depleted by giving — it's amplified. Give more. Trust the slow version of this over the fast one.
readings.Virgo: You have a high tolerance for imperfection in others and almost none for it in yourself. Recalibrate. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Libra: The thing you've been putting off deciding has already been decided by your inaction. Notice this. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Scorpio: You are in a period of accumulating rather than expending. What you're gathering will matter. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Sagittarius: The freedom you're seeking is available now, in this constraint. Find it. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Capricorn: The mountain is real. The view at the top will be real. Don't forget to look at the path you've made. Notice what hasn't changed, not just what has.
readings.Aquarius: The thing you're resisting because it seems too normal — normal isn't the problem. Examine the actual resistance. Say the thing you've been rehearsing.
readings.Pisces: You've given this situation your full emotional presence for a long time. A little more and it shifts. Let this one be easy.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
